name: cortex
description: Turn any corpus into a 3D thinking brain — a local, in-browser curiosity engine that surfaces non-obvious connections as an evidence-backed Insight Digest.
author: Carter Monaco
comment: Versions are pinned EXACTLY (no ^ ranges) on purpose: this is a self-contained artifact meant to survive with no active maintainer. Install with `npm ci` (uses the committed package-lock.json) so a fresh clone builds the same bytes forever. The embedding model + ONNX-runtime wasm are vendored under public/models and public/ort — no CDN at runtime.
comment_overrides: @xenova/transformers is deprecated at 2.17.2 and has no forward security fix, so `npm audit fix --force` proposes DOWNGRADING it to 1.4.2 — a breaking two-year-old major. Do not run it. Instead its two vulnerable transitives are pinned forward here. Neither reaches the shipped bundle: protobufjs (via onnx-proto, Node-only path) is tree-shaken out entirely, and sharp is replaced by an empty stub in the browser branch — verified by grepping dist. The overrides exist so the dependency graph is clean too, not because the deployed artifact was exposed.
